mapper.select:
SELECT j.id, j.employer_account, j.job_description, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.salary_unit, j.work_location, j.university_name, j.latitude, j.longitude, e.company_name FROM job j LEFT JOIN employer e ON j.employer_account = e.employer_account WHERE (j.university_name IS NULL OR j.university_name = '')
AND (
j.job_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.work_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) ORDER BY j.update_time DESC
